# How the NHL Delivers Real-Time Fan Engagement at Scale

Webinar

# How the NHL Delivers Real-Time Fan Engagement at Scale

July 9, 2025

60 minutes

On demand

## Description

**Traditional, static, blast-style campaigns? That’s not in the NHL’s playbook.**  
They’ve ditched static, one-size-fits-all campaigns for dynamic, personalized messaging that moves as fast as the game itself.

Join Iterable, Movable Ink, and **Aileen Berran, Vice President of Fan Engagement & Data Strategy** at the NHL, for an inside look at how one of the world’s most iconic sports leagues is transforming the fan experience.

**What you’ll learn:**

*   How the NHL delivers 33+ dynamic versions of a single message
*   How custom events and live data feeds drive hyper-relevant and personalized communications
*   How they engage fans across email and SMS—in real time

**Powered by:**

Movable Ink – Infinite creative variations of personalized content for any channel

Iterable – Real-time data activation from any source
